title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Steel Roasting Tray, Measuring 36.5 x 24.5 x 5.5 cm Approx with Deep Sides Making This a Ideal Roasting Tin, use for Meat, Vegetables, Sides and More, Grey
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean, rectangular roasting Tray is ideal for making a Sunday lunch for friends and family; Its also ideal for roasting a wide variety of meats and Vegetables

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Roaster can store cooked goods in the fridge or freezer; Meaning its ideal for meal prep and leftovers; Simply take the Roaster strainght from freezer to oven to cook or reheat ideally everytime
NON-STICK: Remove Joints, meats and vegetables with ease with this quality non stick goldflon coating; The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: This quality roaster is made from carbon steel which will prevent warping when cooking all manner of foods

CHEF AID - The well known non-stick cookware range is a loved and popular range of products that caters for both domestic and commercial uses; This range of products is essential and built for everyday use
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home.
